name: 25-delta butterfly spike at a positioning extreme times the forced move
phase: prereg — data substrate in flight (Track B); no feature values read
thesis: A tail-demand spike (butterfly bid) while positioning is extreme marks smart hedging immediately before forced unwinds — a timing signal for the move against the crowd.
mechanism: Whoever pays up for wings at a crowding extreme is pricing the unwind; wings lead.
event_definition: bf25_z (vs trailing 252 obs) >= 2.0 AND (cot_net_pct_1y >= 0.90 or <= 0.10); de-overlap: one event per spike, re-arm below bf25_z < 1.0
direction_rule: |forward 10-td move| exceeds unconditional median (timing claim) AND signed direction is AGAINST the crowded side (secondary)
universe_note: 4 live pairs; AUDNZD included wherever both futures legs (6A 232741, 6N 112741) carry data — constitutional carry-complex scope, not the live trading universe

permutation.null: event-label shuffle preserving per-pair event counts

multiple_testing.rule: the 10 primary p-values (one per HYP, pooled-universe cell) correct together

validation_protocol.de_overlap_standard: ONE observation per distinct event/crossing (NOT per day in state); binomial null at the REAL de-overlapped N; median primary (mean is outlier-dragged); report full sample AND ex-2020

min_sample.underpowered_rule: below pooled minimum -> verdict UNDERPOWERED, never a directional claim

validation_protocol.no_model_training: event studies only; no fitted parameters beyond pre-registered thresholds
validation_protocol.data_substrate: positioning board tables (sentiment_cot_weekly legacy+TFF features, sentiment_options_surface, econ_surprise_z, gdelt_tone) — release/publish-date keyed, look-ahead audited (scripts/audit_look_ahead.py)

success_criteria: candidate iff: pooled primary permutation p < 0.05 AND survives family BH AND median effect sign stable full/ex-2020 AND pooled N >= 50 de-overlapped AND (diversifier gate passes, unless exempt)
failure_criteria: anything else -> NOT_SIGNIFICANT (the prior); direction-unstable -> REJECTED
hash_method: sha256 of json.dumps(doc, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')) where doc = this object MINUS the hash_lock field
